passive.name: Hextech Munitions
passive.description: A percentage of Corki's basic attack damage is dealt as bonus true damage.

wiki_detail.description: {{sbc|Innate:}} '''Corki's''' [[basic attack]]s deal {{sti|{{as|'''bonus''' true damage}}}} equal to {{as|20% AD}}. This damage is affected by {{tip|critical strike}} modifiers.
wiki_detail.notes:
* The mixed damage is dealt in two simultaneous instances of damage, but will pretend to be a single instance for most effects (such as {{ris|Conqueror}} stacks).
** The {{as|true damage}} is dealt in an instance before the {{as|physical damage}}.
** Both instances deal {{tip|basic damage}} and thus natively apply {{sti|life steal}}.
** The attack applies [[on-hit]] effects only once, right at the start.
** Even if the target dies from the {{as|true damage}}, the {{as|physical damage}} will still be applied to it.
*** If the target dies from [[on-hit]] damage, the true damage portion will be skipped and only the physical damage applied.{{bug}}
** {{iis|Runaan's Hurricane}} {{nie|Wind's Fury}} and {{tip|Spellblade}} effects have both been special cased to benefit from ''Hextech Munitions'', causing their damage dealt to deal {{as|'''bonus''' true damage}} equal to 15% of the {{tt|pre-mitigation damage|Damage calculated before modifiers}} dealt.

Q.name: Phosphorus Bomb
Q.description: Corki fires a flash bomb at a target location, dealing magic damage to enemies in the area. This attack additionally reveals units in the area for a duration.
Q.tooltip: Corki lobs a bomb, dealing {{ totaldamage }} magic damage. The area and champions hit are revealed for {{ revealduration }} seconds.{{ spellmodifierdescriptionappend }}

wiki_detail.blurb: {{sbc|Active:}} {{ci|Corki}} fires a flash bomb at the target location, dealing {{as|magic damage}} to enemies hit and {{tip|sight|revealing}} enemy {{tip|champions}} hit.
wiki_detail.description: {{sbc|Active:}} '''Corki''' launches a bomb at the target location that explodes upon impact, dealing {{as|magic damage}} to enemies hit.
wiki_detail.description2: The bomb also grants {{tip|sight}} of the area for 6 seconds and {{tip|standard sight|reveals}} enemy {{tip|champions}} hit for the same duration.
wiki_detail.notes: * The missile has a minimum travel time of {{fd|0.227}} seconds.

W.name: Valkyrie
W.description: Corki flies a short distance, dropping bombs that create a trail of fire that damages opponents who remain in it.
W.tooltip: Corki flies over and scorches a path, burning it for {{ trailduration }} seconds. Enemies in the fire take up to {{ maximumdamage }} magic damage over the duration.{{ spellmodifierdescriptionappend }}

wiki_detail.blurb: {{sbc|Active:}} {{ci|Corki}} {{tip|dash|flies}} a short distance to the target location, dropping bombs that create a trail of fire that deals {{as|magic damage}} continually to enemies within.
wiki_detail.description: {{sbc|Active:}} '''Corki''' {{tip|dashes}} to the target location and drops bombs that leave up to 3 blazing patches along his path, depending on the distance traveled. Each patch lasts {{fd|2.5}} seconds.
wiki_detail.description2: Enemies within the patches are dealt {{as|magic damage}} every {{fd|0.5}} seconds, lingering for 1 second.
wiki_detail.leveling2: {{st|Magic Damage Per Tick|{{ap|30 to 90}} {{as|(+ 15% AP)}}|Total Magic Damage|{{ap|30*5 to 90*5}} {{as|(+ {{ap|15*10}}% AP)}}}}
wiki_detail.description3: ''{{ai|Gatling Gun|Corki}} can be cast during the dash. Valkyrie will cast at max range if cast beyond that.''

E.name: Gatling Gun
E.description: Corki's gatling gun rapidly fires in a cone in front of him, dealing damage and reducing enemy Armor and Magic Resist.
E.tooltip: Corki fires a gatling gun in front of him, dealing {{ totaldamage }} physical damage over {{ sprayduration }} seconds and shredding up to {{ shredmax*-1 }} Armor and Magic Resist.{{ spellmodifierdescriptionappend }}

wiki_detail.blurb: {{sbc|Active:}} {{cis|Corki}} gatling gun rapidly fires in a cone in front of him, continually dealing {{as|physical|pdamage}} damage to enemies hit and applying stacks of ''Gatling Gun''.
wiki_detail.blurb4: {{sbc|Gatling Gun:}} For each stack, the target loses {{as|{{sti|lethality|armor}}}} and {{as|{{sti|magic penetration|magic resist}}}}.
wiki_detail.description: {{sbc|Active:}} '''Corki''' sprays bullets in a cone toward his facing direction for 4 seconds, dealing {{as|physical damage}} every {{fd|0.25}} seconds to all enemies hit and applying a [[stack]] to them at the same tick rate for 2 seconds, refreshing with subsequent hits and stacking up to 4 times. Each stack reduces the target's {{sti|lethality|{{as|armor}}}} and {{sti|magic penetration|{{as|magic resistance}}}}.
wiki_detail.leveling:
{{st|Physical Damage Per Tick|{{ap|100/16 to 280/16}} {{as|(+ {{ap|250/16}}% '''bonus''' AD)}}|Total Physical Damage|{{ap|100 to 280}} {{as|(+ 250% '''bonus''' AD)}}}}
{{st|Resistances Reduction Per Stack|{{ap|3 to 5}}|Total Resistances Reduction|{{ap|3*4 to 5*4}}}}
wiki_detail.notes:
* The maximum resistances reduction is applied after 4 ticks (1 second).
* The direction of the gun firing changes depending on where '''Corki''' is facing.
** '''Corki''' will turn to face in the direction of the cursor upon casting ''Gatling Gun''.
* ''Gatling Gun's'' area of effect can hit close by enemies next to and behind him, due to hitting {{tip|er|enemy boundary edge}}.

R.name: Missile Barrage
R.description: Corki fires a missile toward his target location that explodes on impact, dealing damage to enemies in an area. Corki stores missiles over time, up to a maximum. Every 3rd missile fired will be a Big One, dealing extra damage.
R.tooltip:
Corki fires a missile that explodes on the first enemy hit, dealing {{ rsmallmissiledamage }} physical damage to surrounding enemies. Every third missile instead deals {{ rbigmissiledamage }} physical damage.

This Ability has up to {{ maxammotooltip }} charges. Basic attacks against champions reduce the time between charges by {{ attackrefund }} seconds on hit.{{ spellmodifierdescriptionappend }}

wiki_detail.blurb: {{sbc|Active:}} {{ci|Corki}} fires a missile in the target direction that explodes upon the first enemy hit, dealing {{as|physical damage}} to enemies in an area.
wiki_detail.blurb2: '''Corki''' stores missiles over time, and starts with maximum missiles when he respawns.
wiki_detail.blurb3: Every 3rd missile fired is a ''Big One'': which fires farther and deals increased damage in a bigger explosion.
wiki_detail.description: {{sbc|Passive:}} Basic attacks [[on-hit]] against champions reduce ''Missile Barrage's'' remaining recharge time by {{pp|2 to 4 for 11|0 to 100|type=critical strike chance|color=critical chance|key1=%}} seconds.
wiki_detail.description2: {{sbc|Active:}} '''Corki''' fires a missile in the target direction that explodes upon the first enemy hit, dealing {{as|physical damage}} to enemies within the area.
wiki_detail.description3: '''Corki''' periodically [[stock]]s a ''Missile Barrage'' charge, up to a maximum of 4. He gains 2 charges upon learning the ability and maximum charges upon [[death|respawning]].
wiki_detail.description4: Every third missile '''Corki''' fires is a ''{{ai|Big One|Corki}}'', dealing 100% increased damage as well as gaining increased range and explosion radius.
wiki_detail.width: {{tip|er|icononly = true}} {{tt|80|Both standard and big missile width}}
wiki_detail.notes:
* Once '''Corki''' has learned the ability:
** He receives a [[buff]] that counts a cycle of the number of times ''Missile Barrage'' has been used since the last ''Big One''.
** An indicator becomes visible below his [[health bar]] that tracks the number of missiles in reserve and whether a ''Big One'' is available. They are spent from {{tt|left to right|default, for left-to-right locales}}.
* '''Corki''' retains progress towards a ''Big One'' when he [[death|dies]].
{{Effect at cast time start}}
* ''Missile Barrage's'' effect radius is centered around the location of the missile as it collides.
* {{iis|Malignance}} damage from ''Missile Barrage'' does not count toward {{iis|Eclipse}} passive.
